title: dioscorea glandulosa var. glandulosa
intro: Dioscorea glandulosa var. glandulosa is a variety of the Dioscorea glandulosa plant, a species of yam native to China and Southeast Asia. It is a type of tuberous vine that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Dioscorea glandulosa var. glandulosa include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried tubers, capsules, and teas, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
